content.en:
The other peak Legendary Realm lords were extremely shocked at this moment, and even the Immortal Lords were extremely surprised, and hurriedly persuaded: "Endless Lord, don't provoke the border lords, even if it is the Sword One Lord, he has no power to resist in front of him."

She knew that Ye Tian had stepped into the third level of the peak Legendary Realm Lord, but the old third-level Sword Lord who had mastered several space-time supreme skills couldn't compete with the Border Lord.

The border lord stared at Ye Tian, extremely annoyed in his heart.

Although he felt that Ye Tian was very unusual, when Ye Tian was weak, he couldn't see through it, and Ye Tian's growth speed was too fast, which further aggravated his inner thoughts, so he was not very happy to offend Ye Tian.

But this time, Ye Tian took the initiative to provoke him, and he couldn't help it.

Moreover, the treasure land of the Cloud Forest Sea is indeed very important to him, he has always wanted to step into the fourth level of the Peak Legendary Realm Lord, so he must occupy the Cloud Forest Sea, if he breaks through to the fourth level of the Peak Legendary Realm Lord, then it is nothing for the Cloud Forest Sea to let out.

But now, he won't give up, and he won't want to occupy the Cloud Forest Sea with other peak Legendary Realm lords, and if he occupies it together, he will get much less benefits alone.

"Endless Lord, do you want to be like the Sword One Lord, I don't have such a good temper, be careful that I destroy your clone!" said the Frontier Lord.

"The strength of the Void Region is respected, and I just want to ask for advice~ Border Lord!"

Ye Tian said lightly.

"Good!"

The border lord flicked his fishing rod, and the fishing line and the hook instantly crossed time and space, wanting to hook Ye Tian's body.

This is not an ordinary skill, but a space-time supreme skill created by him, which is very powerful and difficult to avoid.

The sword lord just couldn't avoid it, he was directly hooked, and he lost his ability to resist.

Other peak Legendary Realm lords couldn't see through this trick, but Ye Tian had a half-step eighth-order eternal will, so he saw through this space-time supreme technique, and directly cast a void walk, avoiding this hook.

"Dodge?"

The Frontier Lord was shocked.

Unless it was a fourth-level Peak Legendary Realm Lord, or a third-level Peak Legendary Realm Lord whose will had been raised to a half-step eighth-order Eternal Will, there was no way to avoid him.

"Your Eternal Will has even reached the half-step eighth-order !!"

Frontier Lord's Road.

"That's right, it just so happens that my eternal will is also a half-step eighth-order!" Ye Tian smiled slightly and said.

"Half-step eighth-order Eternal Will is only, it doesn't mean that your strength is really comparable to mine. "

The Frontier Lord is starting to get serious.

In the void, a series of fishing lines appeared, forming an overwhelming fishing line attack, densely locking Ye Tian's attack.

Ye Tian didn't dare to underestimate the border lord, and immediately cast a thousand true bodies, and then cast a sword to slash three bodies.

Get over here!"

A sword aura seemed to slash at Ding's past.

And although the border lord sensed it, he was a beat slower and did not completely defend it.

Poof!

The sword qi bombarded the weakest place of the border lord, even if his own defense was strong, coupled with the defensive space-time supreme skill, it still caused him a little damage

Because, the supreme technique of time and space of sword slashing three bodies is indeed too powerful.

Kill the future body!

Slash now!

The combination of the three moves of the sword slashing the three bodies has a certain threat to the border lords.

Of course, this is not the Dao Domain Tower, and the opponent of the Dao Domain Tower will not escape, so Ye Tian can't do it if he wants to kill a strong person like the second level of the Dao Domain Tower.

In an instant, Ye Tian and the border lord collided countless times, and the traces of the battle between the two could not be understood by other peak Legendary Realm lords, and it seemed that all the traces of the battle had already ended completely before they could be seen clearly.

Soon, the two stopped.

"Endless Lord, how about we take half of it alone?" the Frontier Lord backed down.

"Yes!"

Ye Tian agreed.

The strength of him and the border lord is in the middle of the match, at most, he relies on the sword to slash Sansheng to gain a little upper hand, and he can't kill the border lord at all.

If the border lord didn't admit defeat, he couldn't help it.

Therefore, occupying this Cloud Forest Sea at the same time as the border lord is naturally the best choice.

And this time, there were no fourth-level peak Legendary Realm Lords here, so they had no other competitors

"What's your opinion?"

Ye Tian looked at the other peak Legendary Realm lords.

"No comment!"

The other peak Legendary Realm lords shook their heads one after another, and they didn't dare to have an opinion.

At this moment, they were all shocked, Ye Tian's strength was actually comparable to that of the Border Lord, maybe when, the strength of the two of them would reach the fourth level of the peak Legendary Realm Lord.

Basically, the fourth level of the peak Legendary Realm Lord was recognized as the strongest in the Void Region, because the fifth level had hardly appeared, and the only person who could reach the fifth level at the moment was the old man with a white beard.

"Endless Lord, Frontier Lord, I'll go first!"

One by one, the Peak Legendary Realm Lords left

In this way, the treasure land of the Cloud Forest Sea fell into the hands of Ye Tian and the border lords.

........ 0

At this time, Ye Tian and the border lord began to divide the resources of the Cloud Forest Sea and the question of the ownership of the cultivation of the treasure land.

The border lord said: "The opportunity for the Cloud Forest Sea to be useful to us is also the cloud marrow liquid, there is a cloud marrow stone vein under the cloud forest sea, and some cloud marrow liquid will be born every few years, this cloud marrow liquid can quench our space-time supreme body and make our bodies stronger." There is also the Moire Stele, which allows us to comprehend the mysteries of space-time fusion, which is even better than the effect of the Black Saint 1 Sacrifice Circle. But the best thing is the Yunsen Domain, where we can temper our will. In this way, the cloud marrow liquid we divide equally, and the cloud pattern tablet can also allow us to participate in enlightenment together for hundreds of millions of dollars, but the Yunsen Strange Domain is a bit special, the place is not big, and it can only accommodate one person to enter, if there is one more, the Yunsen Strange Domain will be shocked, very unstable, and not conducive to enlightenment, so we enter the enlightenment separately, how about it?"

"No problem!"

Ye Tian agreed.

And some other resources, the two of them have also shared equally, after all, for a long time, the resources born here are enough to make many peak Legendary Realm Lords excited, if it is for the descendants of their own race, maybe they can also cultivate a few Legendary Realm Lords.

In this way, the Cloud Forest Sea was temporarily owned by Ye Tian and the Border Lord.

And after a while, the specific news of the fall of Lord Yunsen was discovered.

After Ye Tian found out, he was also extremely shocked.

Because Lord Yunsen is not the earth that has fallen to the Eternal Master!_
